title: Absolute Kombat 2.0
description: Weapons that truly improve combat in unique ways, rather than just flashy animations.
body:
# **Absolute Kombat 2.0**

**THIS MODPACK WILL CRASH IF YOU LOAD IT ON VERSIONS OF FORGE ABOVE 47.4.1**

This modpack is all about quests, exploration, and **fast-paced combat** but instead of just fancy swing animations, it implements the combat tests snapshots rework to the combat system and adds new mechanics with unique weapons that make fights feel smoother, more responsive, and more strategic.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DyLpI2QUnio" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### What Makes It Different?


<details>
<summary>Better weapon cooldown</summary>

Weapon cooldown is still there, but instead of lowering weapon attack damage, it slightly lowers attack reach. Allowing you to hold left click to spam attacks at the cost of reach.
![Better cooldown](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeGQwdDFmd3o1OGF0amNrMHh4cWFnbDdzbHdjaHhyd2xpZXBhc2pmNyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/2mD5NuDFrHy5YjukyA/giphy.gif)


</details>



<details>
<summary>Tons of Weapon Variety:</summary>


Different weapons and tools have unique uses, switching between them during combat is key. Relying on just one? Not advised.

![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909142b7b6803325c03090776d243d6d56d79393.png)

Each one with different stats like attack reach and armor piercing.

![Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee71055bb5fa3909c75000a6e4eab25a782d21d8.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mobs have better AI</summary>

![better ai](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbHA2enh5cDZjZmJhNW1xMmx0aWgweWhzaDJla2h2NHM3MnFsbDE4byZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/RvDA8rjbc8yxtvdz5y/giphy.gif)

Come with new tricks, and get even tougher once you unlock the Nether or the End.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sleeping speeds uptime rather than skipping the night</summary>

![Sleep speeds up time](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcmt0Ym1vNncxaHd5YmplMXE0YWJicG9mdW5kbXdubGVwN3N5aDB5eSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/VHINz3sVfGWitBLIBc/giphy.gif)

You'll need better shelter to pass the night, instead of just sleeping in the open, but days last longer, so there’s more time to prepare.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Gear is less powerful by default</summary>

For example, diamond gear protects less and deals less damage:

![Nerfed gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43c84f6d575a4e3934df5e4ed8da0ed1e09c7ab5.png)

You’ll need to do the most with the tools you're given. To survive you'll need to experiment with new tactis, and the new weapons and armor added.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Healing is Actually Interesting</summary>

No more mindlessly eating to get full hp without a second thought. **Natural regen is off**.
You can **heal by killing mobs** as they drop life orbs, it's just enough to keep you fighting a bit longer.
**For serious healing**, you’ll need items like bandages that give **Glass Regeneration** effect which breaks on hit. Absorbtion prevents it from breaking. (_You can turn wool into string btw_).

![Healing](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNGs0eXc0cDRmbjhjMnJ3YTQ1a3dpNTgxNHdyN3NiZmIzZmY3dzJwcSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qaHD4DLmtbRfc7ivsZ/giphy.gif)

It gets easier as you progress and unlock better healing gear (**see the quests book**).

</details>

<details>
<summary>New default Abilities:</summary>
This are abilities that you posses since the very first moment that you create a world.

**Warrior Rage:** A kill streak, the more enemies you kill the more damage you'll deal.

**Dodge:** self explanatory.

**Wall Jump:** Cling to walls and leap off for extra mobility.

**Falling Attack:** Slam the ground with an Area Of Effect attack by crouching and pressing left click while midair (Only works if you’re holding a sword-like weapon).

</details>


<details>
<summary>Inventory Overhaul:</summary>

Dedicated tool slots to keep your hotbar clean.
Offhand has its own keybind that _effectively_ lets you dual-wield cool combos like tridents with riptide and loyalty, or a bow and shield—but **you’ll need to configure the Inventorio mod to acomodate it to your liking.**

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d911b3ae9283a6d4c01586fb35d89e8116af8e43.png)

You can move while the inventory is open.

There's tiered bundles, backpacks, toolbelts, everything you need to keep your inventory nice and clean.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Better enchantments:</summary>

You can open a menu to **turn enchantments ON** and **OFF** from your items. Which allows for fortune and silktouch **combined**.

You can do illegal enchantment combination like frost walker and dept strider, multishot and quickcharge (there's **no damage immunity for projectiles** so shotgun time baby).

You can transfer enchantments from items to books using the grindstone.

**Protection has been removed along with some other enchantments, if you're wondering why you can't use some enchantments is because they're disabled, or is now exclusive and can only be applied to one specific item.**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Better potions</summary>

All kinds of potions are stackable to 16. And the effect duration is also stackable, meaning that you can have 16 minutes of strength by drinking 2 potions of 8 minutes of strength. The limit is 3 hours (180 minutes)

You can use the brewing cauldron to combine up to 3 potions into one. First light it up with flint and steel. Then Just drop the 3 potions you want to combine into it and drop nether wart to finalize.

![combined potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5b151315942c1cd3b7d7bea451f1d2b2f123da3.png)

</details>



To summarize: Faster combat, smarter enemies, and better mechanics that make every fight feel fresh and challenging. If you’re tired of basic combat packs, this one’s got plenty of depth to keep you hooked.


<details>
<summary>WARNING</summary>

Do not use the backpacks feeding upgrade, it doesn't work well with the inventorio mod Utility belt and it could delete items in the belt or hotbar. Use the refill upgrade to refill food from the backpack, alongside the feeder helmet module instead.

If you're wondering why you can't pickup or find some items is probably because they're disabled or hidden.

If you're stuck in a undead army, it could be because ghots are dormant because is daytime without thunder weather. Or you just haven't found the remaining enemy.

</details>



<details>
<summary>For starters</summary>

When starting i wouldn't recommend to go straight to a big open cave, as mobs can easily overwhelm you in open areas. It would be better to go to a mountain where you can mine lots of iron safely in broad daylight, craft shears to get enough wool to convert it to string to craft bandages. Then go explore a small, _corridorlike_ caves or dungeons where you can easily control fights using blocks to stop mobs from reaching you or flee if necessary.

</details>


<details>
<summary>For manual installation</summary>

Just make sure to install the config file, default configs and kubejs files into the .minecraft file.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Want to report bugs, give suggestions and feedback?</summary>

You can do that by creating a issue in this github page:
[https://github.com/xelotex/Absolute-Kombat-2.0](https://github.com/xelotex/Absolute-Kombat-2.0)

</details>
